moments.title: Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games Begin
moments.blurb: The XXII Commonwealth Games officially open today in Glasgow, Scotland, featuring 10 sports and six para sports over 11 days, with the opening ceremony headlined by KT Tunstall.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Excitement
angles.copy: Let the Games begin! The Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games officially kick off today with an incredible opening ceremony. Who are you rooting for? #Glasgow2026 #CommonwealthGames

angles.name: Sporting Spectacle
angles.copy: It's here! The Commonwealth Games are underway in Glasgow, bringing 11 days of world-class sport and incredible stories. Tune in to catch all the action.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Live This Weekend
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival begins today at Henham Park, Suffolk, bringing a diverse mix of music, comedy, literature, and arts until Sunday.

angles.name: Festival Kicks Off
angles.copy: Suffolk is buzzing! Latitude Festival is officially open, with four days of amazing music and arts at Henham Park. Who are you seeing this weekend?

angles.name: Summer Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Kicking off the weekend in style! Latitude Festival is live right now, bringing huge acts and good vibes. What's your top festival moment this summer?

moments.title: Truck Festival Starts Today
moments.blurb: The 'anti-major' Truck Festival is back at Hill Farm, Oxfordshire, from today until Sunday, featuring a diverse lineup of established and emerging artists.

angles.name: Oxfordshire Festival Fun
angles.copy: Truck Festival is go! Hill Farm is alive with music and good times starting today. Who's heading to Oxfordshire this weekend for the 'anti-major' festival?

angles.name: Weekend Escape
angles.copy: Your weekend plans sorted! Truck Festival has opened its gates for three days of top music. What's your must-see act?

moments.title: Steelhouse Festival Kicks Off Tomorrow
moments.blurb: Steelhouse Festival, the UK's highest outdoor rock festival, takes place in Ebbw Vale, South Wales, from tomorrow until Sunday.

angles.name: Rocking Wales
angles.copy: Get ready to rock! Steelhouse Festival kicks off tomorrow in Ebbw Vale, bringing the biggest names in rock to the Welsh mountains. Who's joining the pilgrimage?

angles.name: Highest Rock Festival
angles.copy: The UK's highest rock festival is almost here! Steelhouse starts tomorrow for a weekend of epic riffs and soaring vocals. Who's ready?

moments.title: Verdine White Turns 75
moments.blurb: Verdine White, iconic bassist for Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Earth, Wind & Fire Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the legendary Verdine White of Earth, Wind & Fire! Still bringing the funk and incredible stage presence.

angles.name: Birthday Groove
angles.copy: Celebrate the birthday of Earth, Wind & Fire's incredible bassist, Verdine White, who turns 75 on Saturday! What's your favourite EWF track?

moments.title: Jim McCarty Turns 83
moments.blurb: Jim McCarty, the influential drummer and co-founder of The Yardbirds, celebrates his 83rd birthday on Saturday.

angles.name: Yardbirds Drummer
angles.copy: Happy 83rd birthday to Jim McCarty, the rhythm behind rock legends The Yardbirds! What's your favourite track from the iconic band?

angles.name: Rock Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating Jim McCarty, co-founder and drummer of The Yardbirds, turning 83 on Saturday! A true rock pioneer.

moments.title: Mick Jagger Turns 83
moments.blurb: Sir Mick Jagger, the legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Rolling Stone's Icon
angles.copy: Can you believe it? Sir Mick Jagger turns 83 this Sunday! Still got those moves. What's your favourite Stones hit?

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger on Sunday! The ultimate rock 'n' roll frontman.

moments.title: Darlene Love Turns 85
moments.blurb: The iconic singer Darlene Love, known for her powerful vocals and Christmas classic 'Christmas (Baby Please Come Home)', celebrates her 85th birthday this Sunday.

angles.name: Legendary Voice
angles.copy: A huge happy 85th birthday to the incredible Darlene Love this Sunday! Her voice is truly timeless.

angles.name: Wall of Sound Superstar
angles.copy: Celebrating the amazing Darlene Love's 85th birthday this Sunday! From The Blossoms to 'Wall of Sound' hits, a true legend.

moments.title: Ralph Johnson Turns 75
moments.blurb: Ralph Johnson, percussionist and vocalist for the legendary R&B band Earth, Wind & Fire, celebrates his 75th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: EWF Percussion Master
angles.copy: Sending happy 75th birthday wishes to Ralph Johnson of Earth, Wind & Fire on Tuesday! Still bringing that incredible energy.

angles.name: Funk & Soul Birthday
angles.copy: The rhythm section legend, Ralph Johnson from Earth, Wind & Fire, turns 75 on Tuesday! Time to put on some classic EWF.

moments.title: Dan Aykroyd Turns 74
moments.blurb: Actor, comedian, and musician Dan Aykroyd, known for The Blues Brothers and Ghostbusters, celebrates his 74th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Blues Brother Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 74th birthday to the one and only Dan Aykroyd on Tuesday! From Elwood Blues to Ghostbusters, a true icon.

angles.name: Music & Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Dan Aykroyd's 74th birthday on Tuesday! Get your shades on and put 'Everybody Needs Somebody to Love' on repeat.

moments.title: Belladrum Festival Next Week
moments.blurb: Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival, Scotland's summer celebration of music, community and family, returns to the Scottish Highlands from July 30 to August 1.

angles.name: Highland Festival
angles.copy: The Highlands are calling! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival kicks off next week, bringing incredible music and family fun. Who's heading to 'Bella'?

angles.name: Summer Celebration
angles.copy: Get ready for a heart-warming weekend! Belladrum Tartan Heart Festival starts next week with James and The Human League. What a lineup!

moments.title: Y-Not Festival Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: Y-Not Festival returns to Pikehall, Derbyshire, from July 30 to August 2, with headliners including The Libertines, Reytons, Two Door Cinema Club and The Streets.

angles.name: Derbyshire Indie Fest
angles.copy: Y-Not Festival is almost here! Kicking off next week in Derbyshire with The Libertines and The Streets. Who's excited for this indie-fueled weekend?

angles.name: Peak District Party
angles.copy: Rolling into the Peak District next week! Y-Not Festival brings a massive lineup for an unforgettable summer party. Who's on your must-see list?

moments.title: Camp Bestival Dorset Next Week
moments.blurb: Camp Bestival Dorset, a family-friendly festival, returns to Lulworth Castle from July 30 to August 2, featuring Bastille, Fatboy Slim, Billy Ocean and De La Soul.

angles.name: Family Festival Fun
angles.copy: Get ready for Lulworth Castle! Camp Bestival Dorset kicks off next week with an amazing lineup for all ages, including Fatboy Slim and Billy Ocean.

angles.name: Dorset Delights
angles.copy: Camp Bestival Dorset returns next week with Bastille, De La Soul, and more! Who's packing their bags for a fantastic family festival?

moments.title: Buddy Guy Turns 90
moments.blurb: The legendary blues guitarist and singer Buddy Guy celebrates his 90th birthday next Thursday.

angles.name: Blues Master
angles.copy: A monumental birthday next week! Blues icon Buddy Guy turns 90. Still influencing generations of guitarists. Happy Birthday, legend!

angles.name: Living Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 90th birthday to the incredible Buddy Guy next Thursday! What's your favourite blues track from the master?

moments.title: Kate Bush Turns 68
moments.blurb: The iconic and influential British singer-songwriter Kate Bush celebrates her 68th birthday next Thursday.

angles.name: Wuthering Heights Icon
angles.copy: Happy 68th birthday to the one-of-a-kind Kate Bush next Thursday! A true visionary who continues to inspire.

angles.name: Musical Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating the unique artistry of Kate Bush, who turns 68 next Thursday! Her impact on music is immeasurable.

moments.title: Fatboy Slim Turns 63
moments.blurb: Norman Quentin Cook, better known as Fatboy Slim, the influential DJ and electronic music pioneer, celebrates his 63rd birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Right Here, Right Now
angles.copy: Happy 63rd birthday to the absolute legend Fatboy Slim next Friday! Still praising him for all those bangers. What's your favourite track?

angles.name: Big Beat Pioneer
angles.copy: Celebrating the birthday of the one and only Fatboy Slim, who turns 63 next Friday! Get ready to 'Eat, Sleep, Rave, Repeat'.

moments.title: Will Champion Turns 48
moments.blurb: Will Champion, the talented drummer for the globally successful band Coldplay, celebrates his 48th birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Coldplay's Beat
angles.copy: Happy 48th birthday to Will Champion, the brilliant drummer of Coldplay, next Friday! What's your all-time favourite Coldplay song?

angles.name: Drumming Dynamo
angles.copy: Celebrating Coldplay's Will Champion, who turns 48 next Friday! The driving force behind so many anthems.

moments.title: Lil Uzi Vert Turns 31
moments.blurb: American rapper and singer Lil Uzi Vert, known for hits like 'XO Tour Llif3', celebrates his 31st birthday next Friday.

angles.name: Rap Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 31st birthday to the one and only Lil Uzi Vert next Friday! What's your favourite track from the rap superstar?

angles.name: Celebrating Uzi
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Lil Uzi Vert turns 31 next Friday. Drop your favourite Uzi lyrics below!

moments.title: UK Summer Holidays in Full Swing
moments.blurb: School summer holidays are now in full swing across much of the UK, with many families enjoying their breaks until late August or early September.

angles.name: Summer Break Vibes
angles.copy: Summer holidays are officially here for many across the UK! What are your plans for soaking up the sun and making memories?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: Schools out for summer! If you're enjoying the summer break, tell us what fun activities you've got lined up.
